description: This pipeline reads in files from a folder and applies filtering to them. The main steps are reading in the files, converting file paths into file data, and then applying morphological operations.

85425fc1-c3ab-4778-9b74-dd365f9c431b.name: import-cellpose-model
85425fc1-c3ab-4778-9b74-dd365f9c431b.description: Imports a Cellpose model from a file

e2d578ab-95c2-4093-b8b9-b22cf240d9c2.name: import-file-list
e2d578ab-95c2-4093-b8b9-b22cf240d9c2.description: Converts each provided path into file data.

8c4b1a2e-a1d0-4461-92ae-d1caffa78361.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
8c4b1a2e-a1d0-4461-92ae-d1caffa78361.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
